params.name: symbol
params.description: Ticker symbol with exchange suffix, e.g. AAPL.US.

params.name: api_token
params.description: API token assigned to your EODHD account.

params.name: order
params.description: Sort order of returned rows. a=ascending, d=descending.

params.name: from
params.description: Inclusive start date in YYYY-MM-DD format.

params.name: to
params.description: Inclusive end date in YYYY-MM-DD format.

params.name: filter
params.description: Return only a single field, e.g. last_close or last_volume.

items.docs: Returns the end-of-day historical OHLCV time series for a given ticker symbol. The symbol must include the exchange suffix, for example AAPL.US or BMW.XETRA. One call per request regardless of date range.
